payload.answer: Committed durable architecture decisions and preserved the two unresolved questions as open questions, not current facts.
citations: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent.
Open questions: Should Telegram be added later? Which model is cheapest while saturating performance?

entity_resolution.reason: No existing entity identifiers were provided; entities are named directly from the summary.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the Brain personal memory system.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection rather than the primary source of truth.
Slack should operate as a strict memory intake agent for Brain.
It is undecided whether Telegram should be added as a Brain integration later.
It is undecided which model is cheapest while saturating performance for Brain.

details: Stored Brain DB as source of truth.
Stored Cognee as rebuildable semantic projection.
Stored Slack as strict memory intake agent.
Recorded Telegram integration as an open question.
Recorded model cost/performance selection as an open question.
